name: engram
description: Persistent local memory for Claude Code. Learns from your sessions, remembers across them.

deep_review.title: Deep Review
deep_review.description: Enable Engram's session review prompt after substantial sessions.

deep_review_threshold.title: Deep Review Threshold
deep_review_threshold.description: Minimum number of user/assistant turns before Engram flags a session for deeper review.

injection_budget.title: Injection Budget
injection_budget.description: Maximum number of characters Engram can inject into Claude at session start or after compaction.
